old_claim.note: Recombinant DNA & Genetic Engineering is modeled as a necessary component or method for this technology in the current graph.

new_claim.note: Recombinant DNA methods are a foundational predecessor and traditional method family for genetic engineering, but the broad field also includes later non-recombinant-DNA editing and delivery approaches.

source_shape.source_locator: Key Points and abstract framing traditional genetic engineering via restriction enzymes and DNA ligases, contrasted with recombineering as another chromosome-engineering route.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The review describes traditional genetic engineering as using restriction enzymes and DNA ligases to generate recombinant DNA molecules, while also reviewing later recombination-based engineering methods.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This supports a lineage edge because the source treats recombinant-DNA construction as a traditional route within the field, not as the only possible mechanism for all genetic-engineering technologies.

ontology_before: The broad Genetic Engineering umbrella node treated the Recombinant DNA & Genetic Engineering method-family node as a hard prerequisite.
ontology_after: The edge now records recombinant DNA as a foundational and traditional predecessor method family, while the broad Genetic Engineering node remains open to later editing and delivery approaches.

demotion_preserves.reason: Molecular biology remains the broad experimental foundation for deliberate genome manipulation across recombinant-DNA, genome-editing, and delivery methods.
DNA sequencing remains the characterization and verification capability that supports genetic-engineering work across method families.

invariant_preserved_or_changed: Invariant changed deliberately: a broad umbrella field no longer has a single hard method-family prerequisite, while concrete enabling biology and sequencing context remain explicit.
would_reject_if: A source directly showed that recombinant-DNA construction is necessary for every technology covered by the broad Genetic Engineering node.
The Genetic Engineering node were narrowed to mean only recombinant-DNA construction rather than the broader field.
The correction removed the remaining biology, sequencing, delivery, or bioinformatics context edges needed to interpret the broad field.
short_reason: Recombinant DNA is foundational lineage for genetic engineering, but not a hard prerequisite for every later method in the broad field.
